title: mCytoMAP-core: reference implementation of the Evidence-Tier Score and two-tier prior
description: Standard-library Python reference implementation of the mCytoMAP Evidence-Tier Score (ETS) rubric and the two-tier Bayesian-style prior pi_norm(node), the literature-derived layer of the cytoskeletal-checkpoint prioritisation framework mCytoMAP. Running reproduce_values.py regenerates the published per-node values in Tables 1A/1B and Figure 3C, and the per-cell ETS(node | sex, context) values in Supplementary Table S1, of the Targetome Perspective Target-S2026-0032. No dependencies beyond the Python ≥ 3.10 standard library.
